data.title: Lazarus Group launches ‘QinShihuang’ meme coin to launder $26M more from Bybit stash
data.description:
North Korea’s Lazarus Group dropped a meme coin Sunday morning called QinShihuang on the Pump Fun platform to launder $26 million from the nearly $1.5 billion they stole from the crypto exchange Bybit. On-chain investigator ZachXBT first exposed this, as per usual, confirming that the wallet involved (5STkQy…95T7Cq) sent exactly 60 SOL tokens to another […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/lazarus-group-meme-coin-launder-26m-bybit/

data.title: BITCOIN DROPS, LIVE TRADING! (Bybit Hack, What To Expect..)
Bybit releases blacklist API to help fund tracking and launches bounty program
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptocurrency exchange Bybit announced the launch of a new API to update the blacklist of identified suspicious wallet addresses. The API will help various project parties and security experts track and recover stolen funds more efficiently under time pressure. This list of suspicious addresses was compiled by industry white hat hackers and investigators within three days of the hacker attack. Bybit has received thousands of clues from industry colleagues so far.
With the joint efforts of internal and external security teams, the elite investigation team confirmed a batch of malicious wallet addresses. Bybit will continue to update the blacklist to ensure that cybersecurity experts and partners can effectively intercept illegal activities. For contributors who successfully intercept and recover funds, Bybit will provide a 10% bounty reward.
Bybit is developing the HackBounty platform and will release an announcement at the appropriate time. This platform aims to empower the entire industry to jointly track the actions of hackers and encourage all security experts to continue to pay attention to the latest progress of this innovative program. Bybit will also continue to update the blacklist to help partners intercept illegal fund flows, and contributors who successfully recover funds will receive a 10% bounty reward.
This action has led to a historic and comprehensive cooperation in the crypto industry, forming an industry-wide Crypto's Defense Alliance. Bybit has announced a list of individuals, institutions and teams that have contributed to this emergency action, and the list is still being updated. This includes but is not limited to the following partners and peers:
Mandiant, Verichain, Sygnia.co provide key forensic analysis to reveal the truth of this hacker attack.
ZeroShadow launched a 24/7/365 global emergency response team to assist in tracking malicious actors, fund flows, and communicate with law enforcement agencies to support investigations and recovery of stolen assets.
Chainalysis, Elliptic, TRM, Goplus, SEAL 911, ZachXBT quickly marked on-chain addresses related to the attack, limiting the ability of hackers to launder stolen assets.
SlowMist, BlockSec, BEOSIN provide professional security consulting and threat analysis.
VerifyVASP, AML Bot, CryptoForensic contribute key compliance and risk assessment solutions to enhance overall security response capabilities.
Binance, Coinbase, Bitget, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Wormhole, Synapse, Connext, Chainflip, Across.to, Symbiosis.finance, AVAX, ChangeNow, fixedfloat, cBridge provide cross-chain security measures to help block the flow of hacker funds.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 650 USDT with a 1.25% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 23, 2025, 15:47 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 650 USDT and is now trading at 649.400024 USDT, with a narrowed 1.25% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees $118 Million in Liquidations Over 24 Hours
data.description: According to PANews, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market experienced liquidations totaling $118 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $63.57 million, while short positions saw liquidations of $54.90 million. Bitcoin (BTC) faced liquidations amounting to $10.06 million, and Ethereum (ETH) saw liquidations totaling $26.25 million.

data.title: Bybit Successfully Manages Major Cryptocurrency Hack
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency trading platform by volume, has effectively managed the largest hack in cryptocurrency history. On February 21, 2025, hackers stole approximately $1.5 billion in digital assets from Bybit's Ethereum wallet, marking the largest cryptocurrency theft to date. Despite the unprecedented attack, Bybit's swift and transparent crisis management ensured market stability without significant price fluctuations.

Bybit's response demonstrated high standards of speed, transparency, and professionalism. Following the incident, Bybit co-founder and CEO Ben Zhou addressed the community via the X platform within 30 minutes and initiated a live broadcast within an hour. This two-hour real-time communication provided detailed explanations and updates, effectively curbing market panic and maintaining investor trust, setting a new benchmark for crisis management in the crypto industry.

Throughout the incident, Bybit's withdrawal and product services remained unaffected, allowing users to access their accounts and contact customer support seamlessly. This efficient service under extreme pressure showcased the team's capability and professionalism.

The incident also highlighted unprecedented unity within the crypto industry. Major global exchanges quickly acted to block the hacker's wallet addresses, preventing further movement of the stolen funds. This cooperation underscored the industry's maturity and demonstrated that competitors could collaborate to maintain the ecosystem's security and stability.

Despite the attack's scale, Bybit maintained a 1:1 reserve guarantee, ensuring all customer assets remained intact. Ben Zhou assured that Bybit had sufficient financial strength to cover the loss, emphasizing that all customer assets were fully reserved at a 1:1 ratio. This commitment reflected Bybit's financial robustness and dedication to asset security.

Bybit promptly collaborated with global regulatory and law enforcement agencies to track the stolen funds and pursue legal action. This cooperation not only accelerated the response but also set a new standard for future collaboration between the crypto industry and regulators. As the investigation progresses, the incident is expected to enhance industry security standards and potentially lead to a more robust regulatory framework.

Bybit demonstrated strong resilience by efficiently processing over 350,000 withdrawal requests within 12 hours of the hack. Despite the surge in withdrawals, Bybit ensured all transactions were completed without major delays, showcasing the team's professionalism and experience in crisis management. Within 24 hours, Bybit's operations returned to normal, with user trading activity rebounding to pre-incident levels. This rapid recovery highlighted the high level of trust users and investors have in Bybit's crisis management capabilities.

Bybit's handling of the hack set a new standard for crisis management in the crypto industry, turning a potentially catastrophic event into a demonstration of resilience and transparency. This incident not only showcased Bybit's exceptional operational capabilities but also highlighted the industry's growing maturity and collaborative spirit.

data.title: Inflation And Immigration Key Issues For U.S. Voters, Survey Reveals
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a recent Reuters/Ipsos survey indicates that 58% of Americans consider inflation a significant factor in their voting decisions for upcoming elections. Additionally, 32% of respondents approve of U.S. President Donald Trump's approach to managing inflation. The survey also highlights that 55% of Americans view the deportation of illegal immigrants as an important issue, with 47% expressing approval of Trump's handling of immigration matters.

data.title: The progress of KAITO token airdrop has reached 30.37%, and the number of claiming addresses is nearly 85,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Dune data, the KAITO token airdrop application has been completed by 30.37%, about 30.368 million tokens have been airdropped, and the application addresses are approximately 84,100.

data.title: Bybit Attacker Allegedly Launders Funds Through Meme Token
data.description: According to Odaily, on-chain data suggests that an attacker on the Bybit platform may be involved in laundering funds by issuing a Meme token on PumpFun. The attacker reportedly transferred SOL tokens to a specific address before launching the Meme token. Currently, the market value of this token is approximately $2.2 million, with a trading volume of around $26 million. However, the liquidity remains low, prompting a warning for community users to exercise caution when interacting with this token.

data.title: Hong Kong Asia Holdings announced that it spent HK$5.9369 million to increase its holdings of 7.88 bitcoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hong Kong-listed company Hong Kong Asia Holdings issued an announcement, announcing that its board of directors has approved the company to further increase its investment in Bitcoin, and on the 20th of this month, it conducted a series of transactions on the cryptocurrency trading platform on the open market to purchase approximately 7.88 units of Bitcoin, with a total cost of approximately HK$5.9369 million, which was paid with funds from the group's internal resources. It currently holds approximately 8.88 units of Bitcoin, with an average cost of HK$756,200.
